state.next-action: `11-05` remains active: Grime Time has a real App Router root layout with `ClerkProvider`, `src/proxy.ts` uses `clerkMiddleware()`, the marketing/login surfaces show Clerk-hosted sign-in/up and `UserButton`, Payload `users` persist `clerkUserID`, the shared claim/invite token surface uses Clerk-first copy and Clerk-backed completion against the existing Payload user, the direct forgot/reset routes present Clerk-first recovery guidance when Clerk is enabled, the old `/auth/register` plus `/auth/confirm` routes now short-circuit into the Clerk-first flow, the active Clerk-first customer screens plus signed-in nav no longer import Supabase browser helpers directly, the server now resolves customer identity through one shared helper so Clerk-primary mode no longer silently falls back to Supabase sessions, and existing Payload admins now bind onto Clerk by email on first sign-in so the app-owned impersonation tooling keeps working without Clerk's paid impersonation add-on. Next work on this slice is any remaining Supabase-era server cleanup plus a deliberate pass over admin/ops affordances that still assume Payload-auth-first staff login.
